zh.lifeSummary: 當Sibyl de Astley於大約1310年出生在英國英格蘭瓦維其可爾艾斯利時，她的父親Sir Giles Astley32歲，母親Alice de Wolvey28歲。她於1337年與Sir Ralph Basset 3rd Lord Basset of Sapcote結婚。他們至少是3個女兒的父母。她去世於1412年10月12日在英國英格蘭萊希斯特斯爾薩普可特享年103歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sibyl de Astley于大约1310年出生在英国英格兰瓦維其可爾艾斯利时，她的父亲Sir Giles Astley32岁，母亲Alice de Wolvey28岁。她于1337年与Sir Ralph Basset 3rd Lord Basset of Sapcote结婚。他们至少是3个女儿的父母。她去世于1412年10月12日在英国英格兰萊希斯特斯爾薩普可特享年103岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Astley
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from any of several places in England called Astley (in Lancashire, Shropshire, Warwickshire, Worcestershire, and Yorkshire), from Old English ēast ‘east’ + lēah ‘woodland clearing’. The modern surname seems to be particularly associated with the one in Warwickshire. See also Astle .

variants.name: Astle
meanings: English: habitational name from a place in Cheshire called Astle, from Old English ēast ‘east’ + hyll ‘hill’. There may also have been some confusion with Asthall and Astley . Or occasionally this may be a topographic name denoting residence on an ‘east hill’ (from Middle English ast + hill or hull), i.e. a hill to the east of a settlement.
English: perhaps also a habitational name from Astwell, Northamptonshire, from Old English ēast ‘east’ + wielle ‘spring’.
English: habitational name from Asthall, Oxfordshire, from Old English ēast ‘east’ + halh ‘nook’.

nameMeanings.name: Sibyl
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Variant spelling of   Sybil .  Even in classical times there was confusion between the two vowels in this word.

en.lifeSummary: When Sibyl de Astley was born about 1310, in Astley, Warwickshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, Sir Giles Astley, was 32 and her mother, Alice de Wolvey, was 28. She married Sir Ralph Basset 3rd Lord Basset of Sapcote in 1337. They were the parents of at least 3 daughters. She died on 12 October 1412, in Sapcote, Leicestershire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 103.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sibyl de Astley est née environ 1310, à Astley, Warwickshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir Giles Astley, avait 32 ans et sa mère, Alice de Wolvey, avait 28 ans. Elle a épousé Sir Ralph Basset 3rd Lord Basset of Sapcote en 1337. Ils ont eu au moins 3 filles. Elle est décédée le 12 octobre 1412, à Sapcote, Leicestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 103 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sibyl de Astley um 1310 in Astley, Warwickshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir Giles Astley 32 und ihre Mutter Alice de Wolvey 28. Sie hat 1337 Sir Ralph Basset 3rd Lord Basset of Sapcote geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Töchter. Sie starb am 12. Oktober 1412 im Alter von 103 Jahren in Sapcote, Leicestershire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sibyl de Astley è nata il circa 1310 nel Astley, Warwickshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, Sir Giles Astley, aveva 32 anni e sua madre, Alice de Wolvey, aveva 28 anni. Lei sposato Sir Ralph Basset 3rd Lord Basset of Sapcote nel 1337. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figlie. Morì il 12 ottobre 1412, nel Sapcote, Leicestershire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 103 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Sibyl de Astleyが約1310年にイギリスイギリスワーウィクシュアイアアストリーで生まれた時，父Sir Giles Astleyは32歳，母Alice de Wolveyは28歳であった。1337年にSir Ralph Basset 3rd Lord Basset of Sapcoteと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1412年10月12日にイギリスイギリスレアイセステルシュアイアサプコトで103歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sibyl de Astley(이)가 대략 1310년 영국 잉글랜드 워윅실르 애스틀리에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Giles Astley(은)는 32세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Alice de Wolvey(은)는 28세였다. 그녀는 1337년 Sir Ralph Basset 3rd Lord Basset of Sapcote(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1412년 10월 12일 영국 잉글랜드 레이스스터실르 사p컷에서 103세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sibyl de Astley nasceu aproximadamente 1310, em Astley, Warwickshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Sir Giles Astley, tinha 32 anos e sua mãe, Alice de Wolvey, tinha 28 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir Ralph Basset 3rd Lord Basset of Sapcote em 1337. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhas. Ela faleceu em 12 de outubro de 1412, em Sapcote, Leicestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 103 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sibyl de Astley родилась около 1310 г. в местности астли, варвиккшир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Sir Giles Astley было 32 года, а матери, которую звали Alice de Wolvey, 28. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Ralph Basset 3rd Lord Basset of Sapcote в 1337 г. У них было по крайней мере 3 дочери. Она умерла 12 октября 1412 г. в местности сапкот, лисестиршир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 103 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sibyl de Astley nació aproximadamente 1310, en Astley, Warwickshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Sir Giles Astley, tenía 32 años y su mamá, Alice de Wolvey, tenía 28 años. Se casó con Sir Ralph Basset 3rd Lord Basset of Sapcote en 1337. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijas. Murió el 12 de octubre de 1412, en Sapcote, Leicestershire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 103 años.
